metadata.description: Candidate-only staging file for future official public-company ticker coverage. This file is not loaded by the app and must not be promoted directly into production graph data.
source_policy_notes: Use only reviewable public sources such as official exchange listing data, SEC company data, company investor relations pages, or other durable official public sources.
Do not add guessed tickers, fake companies, inferred listings, placeholder source URLs, or unsourced records.
Keep ticker-universe records in candidate review until source validation, duplicate checks, manual review, production validation, and an explicit future writer phase are complete.

candidate_schema_example.name: Official public company legal or listing name
candidate_schema_example.source_url: Official source URL beginning with https://
